programs.title: God's Country Song
programs.desc: A charming but troubled country singer learns he has a 5-year-old son that he didn't know existed.

programs.title: A Royal in Paradise
programs.desc: Struggling with writer's block, Olivia takes a vacation and meets a prince who must marry royalty.

programs.title: A Belgian Chocolate Christmas
programs.desc: A photographer takes her friend's place at a Belgian culinary school and bonds with the chocolatier.

programs.title: Much Ado About Christmas
programs.desc: When the truth comes out, it puts a budding Christmas romance at risk.

programs.title: Grounded in Love
programs.desc: When a flight attendant loses her job, she returns to her grandma's farm to replant her roots.

programs.title: A Lot Like Christmas
programs.desc: A new big box chain store threatens Jessica's Christmas tree lot when it begins to sell trees.
